overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a cowboy hat first riding a covered ferry through a rainy bayou, then transitioning to wading through a shallow rocky river in a forested valley. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with heavy rainfall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden ferry deck crossing bayou waters

agents.ego_description: standing on a moving ferry boat observing the rainy swamp landscape ahead

entered.detail: dark wooden roof structure covering the ferry deck with visible beams
thick wooden post supporting the canopy roof on the left side
thick wooden post supporting the canopy roof on the right side
small metal pail sitting on the ferry deck
weathered wooden planks forming the floor of the ferry
brownish-green swamp water with gentle ripples from rain
tall cypress trees with Spanish moss lining the distant bank
dense cypress forest visible on the right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a covered wooden ferry moving steadily through murky bayou waters. Rain falls heavily around the open-sided canopy while dense cypress trees and swamp vegetation line the distant banks visible through the wooden support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest river with rocky bed

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions from boat to character wading in shallow river

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep river water moving upstream against the current

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible current and ripples around the character's legs
stones and pebbles visible beneath the transparent water surface
large rocks protruding from the water in the river
scattered boulders along the right side of the river channel
tree-covered slopes rising from the riverbank
dense pine forest covering the right hillside

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the character is now wading through a shallow rocky river surrounded by forested hills. The water is clear with visible stones beneath the surface as the character moves steadily upstream in the continuing rain, with pine trees lining both riverbanks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a rainy, enclosed bayou crossing to an open trek through a forested river valley. It begins with the character standing on a covered wooden ferry, moving steadily through murky swamp waters as heavy rain falls around the open-sided canopy and dense cypress trees. As the scene shifts, the murky bayou gives way to a shallow, rocky riverbed where the water becomes clear and stones are visible beneath the surface. The camera then follows the character wading steadily upstream through the continuing rainfall, while the swamp vegetation is replaced by pine trees lining the banks of the forested hills.
